title: CIP-309 item entry
description: A single content item in a PoE record: a CLOSED CBOR map `{hashes, ? uris, ? enc}`. `hashes` (REQUIRED) is the non-empty content-hash map — the primary, content-first claim. `uris` (optional) is a non-empty array of chunked URI arrays locating the content (or, for sealed PoE, the ciphertext). `enc` (optional) is the sealed-PoE encryption envelope. STRUCTURAL only: `enc` is admitted here as an unconstrained value (mirroring the permissive source schema) so the validator can run the ENC_REQUIRES_CONTENT_HASH pre-check before any inner-shape error and surface the most informative code first; its intended shape is encryption-envelope.schema.json. The map is closed: unknown keys are rejected.

enc.$comment: Unconstrained structurally (mirrors permissive `z.unknown()`); intended shape is encryption-envelope.schema.json, validated by the domain pass after the ENC_REQUIRES_CONTENT_HASH pre-check.
